text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It's a crazy lineup, huh!? I was just my usual wicked self and 
the word spread like wildfireвШЖ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oguri-paisen, Ban-chamu, Yae-meroвА¶вА¶ 
KuuuuпљЮ it really gets you fired up!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it means this race is gonna be extra spicy! 
Uhyaa, I'm pyschedпљЮвШЖ CrazyпљЮвШЖ

Daitaku Helios hadn't even debuted yet. No matter how much 
hidden talent she had, against experienced opponents like thisвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Don't be such a downerпљЮ. 
'Sides, looky there!

text_block_list.name: Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Uwa, seriously!? Helios-chan's runnin' in a mock race 
that looks like a G1. So the group LANE wasn't lyingвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Experienced Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Really, I have no idea what that girl's thinkingвА¶вА¶ But, an 
opportunity like this doesn't come around often. I need to 
properly analyze it!

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
HeliosпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!! You're our Blitz CaptainпљЮпљЮ!! 
You better not lose to them when it comes to gutsпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! Just watch meпљЮвШЖ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
See? They're all chompin' at the bit too! 
Got no choice but to take the reins!!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
'Sides, results? 
вАХWe won't know 'til it's over!!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Well, just sit back and relaxпљЮ! 
Heli-poyo is gonna knock this WeiпљЮ outta the parkвШЖ Let's go!

If she's like that in front of this line up, 
then just maybeвА¶вА¶ that means she was confident 
enough that she purposefully gathered them!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: вАХHell yeah, pedal to the metalпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!!!!

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
OooooohвА¶вА¶!? Daitaku Helios leapt out in front! 
And she just keeps on acceleratingвА¶вА¶!

Daitaku Helios was running at a speed that seemed like she wasn't 
even thinking about pacing herself, she just continued to pull 
further ahead. And that's not allвАХвАХ

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Gyahahaa, keep it up Helios!! 
Red-line itпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You got itпљЮпљЮ!! 
You better kick it up over there tooпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!! Ahahaa!

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
She's got enough leewayвА¶вА¶ to hold a conversation!? That girl, 
don't tell meвА¶вА¶ she's seriously planning to run away with this? 
Against those opponentsвА¶вА¶!?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: вАХIпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ caaaaan'tпљЮпљЮпљЮпљЮ!!!!

text_block_list.name: Everyone
text_block_list.text: AaaaaaaahпљЮвА¶вА¶
In the end, she couldn't recover from thatвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
ZeeeehвА¶вА¶ HaaaвА¶вА¶ Ugh, gonna pukeвА¶вА¶ 
And I was lastпљЮвА¶вА¶ HaaпљЮпљЮвА¶вА¶ Seriously, seriouslyвАХ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: вАХSeriously, that was hilarious!! WahahahaпљЮ!

choice_data_list: You had no chance from the start!?
You had no chance from the start!?
text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I really wanted to push through to the end thoughпљЮ. 
Knew it, I just didn't have the stamina! FuhaвШЖ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, there was no way! But, I had a blast!вЩ™ 
I just love racingпљЮ! Good work, me! Good work everyoneпљЮ!

text_block_list.name: Rookie Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Haa, I was worried there. Daitaku HeliosвА¶вА¶ Fufuu, what an 
interesting girl. But, wellвА¶вА¶ teaming up with herвА¶вА¶ is a bit much.

text_block_list.name: Experienced Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
Talking to the spectators during the raceвА¶вА¶ it's almost like she 
has no ability to focus. A girl that only wants to perform, I 
wouldn't want to face herвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Friend B
text_block_list.text:
Helios, you really are insaneпљЮ! You gotta do something fun like 
this again. Haven't you been offline kind of often lately?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I haveпљЮ!! We should fix that! 
LANE me!! See yaпљЮвШЖ

choice_data_list: Um, aren't youвА¶вА¶ a little upset?
Um, aren't youвА¶вА¶ a little upset?
text_block_list.text:
She had just come in last, but I didn't sense any sense of 
frustration from Daitaku Helios at all. Of course, she was 
probably down about it, butвА¶вА¶

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaa, about thatпљЮ! 
Nope, not one bitвШЖ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Well, it would have been awesome if I won! 
Losing isn't gonna pull me down, though. No regrets!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I mean, it was super fun, right!? Everyone was all smiles! 
And I wasпљЮ awesome! Ain't nothing to be down aboutпљЮ, right!?

It wasn't a front at all, she, from the bottom of 
her heartвА¶вА¶ was laughing. I never thought I'd meet 
a student here that was so outside the norm.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's up with your palm!? 
Isn't it really red?

choice_data_list: (Right, I was excited for her. ButвА¶вА¶)
text_block_list.text:
When I looked, my fingernails had left marks in my palm. "She 
might win!" вА¶вА¶when I had been thinking that, I must have 
unintentionally clenched my fists.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
вА¶вА¶Ah, I just remembered something! 
We were talking about contracts, right? What do you want to doвАХ

text_block_list.name: Friend C
text_block_list.text:
Yo, HeliпљЮ! We're heading to a family 
restaurant with Jordan, wanna comeпљЮ?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: I'll goвАХвАХ!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Hnya?

choice_data_list: Do you have a dream you want to fulfill?
Do you have a dream you want to fulfill?
text_block_list.text:
I had gotten to see her run but, I still didn't have a clear 
understanding of her. At the very least, I wanted to hear what 
she wanted to focus onвАХ

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
A never-ending festival! 
ByeeeeпљЮвШЖ

вАХHer run was very promising. She could probably 
make big things happen, that's what I felt. ButвА¶вА¶

There was no good or bad when it came to dreams. 
But if I was going to be her trainer, I wanted 
her to be able to aim for it seriously.

choice_data_list: (I need to know more about her)
text_block_list.text:
A clash of serious emotions was what made races awe-inspiring. 
With the way she is now, I couldn't sense any sense of 
"seriousness" in herвА¶вА¶

And so, on the next day off. I went in to the city to find 
Daitaku HeliosвА¶вА¶ I found her almost immediately, and she seemed 
to be in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You came at just the right time! 
You free? Wanna dance!?
